hero.title:
Travel the world,
stay {connected}
hero.lead: Instant eSIM data plans for modern travelers. Activate in minutes, no physical SIM required.

howItWorks.label: How it works
howItWorks.title: Three steps to global connectivity
howItWorks.step1Desc: Choose from 190+ countries and regions. Pay once, no subscriptions.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Scan the QR code or tap to install. No physical SIM swap needed.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Arrive at your destination and connect instantly. No roaming fees.

items.a: An eSIM (embedded SIM) is a digital SIM card built into your device. It lets you activate a cellular plan without a physical SIM card — perfect for travelers.
Most modern smartphones support eSIM including iPhone XS and later, Google Pixel 3 and later, Samsung Galaxy S20 and later, and many other devices.

items.q: How do I install my eSIM?
items.a: After purchase, you'll receive a QR code. Go to your phone's cellular settings, choose 'Add eSIM', and scan the code. Activation takes under 2 minutes.

items.q: Can I use my eSIM in multiple countries?
items.a: Yes! Regional plans cover multiple countries. For single-country plans, you can purchase additional plans for each destination.

items.q: When does my data plan start?
items.a: Your plan activates when you first connect in the destination country — not at purchase time. You won't waste data while traveling to your destination.

cta.title: Ready to roam?
cta.subtitle: Join 500,000+ travelers who stay connected worldwide.
